basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Project Officer. The Walk-in on 03-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Roorkee official website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.A., with at least 05 years of relevant experience, M.Tech / M.C.A with at least 10 years of relevant experience
